page_metadata.biotools__summary: ColorCells is a database of expression, classification and functions of lncRNAs in single cells. Single cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-Seq) technology has revealed significant differences in gene expression levels between different cell groups.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ColorCells is a database of expression, classification and functions of lncRNAs in single cells. Single cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-Seq) technology has revealed significant differences in gene expression levels between different cell groups.
